final:
module D_flip_flop (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg Q
);
    wire S, R;

  wire temp1_D = D;
  wire temp2_~RST = ~RST;
  assign S = temp1_D & temp2_~RST;      // Set condition
    assign R = ~D & RST;      // Reset condition

    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            Q <= 0;           // Reset output Q to 0
        end else begin
            Q <= S;           // Transfer D to Q
        end
    end
endmodule

module decoder_2to4 (
    input wire A1,
    input wire A0,
    output wire Y3,
    output wire Y2,
    output wire Y1,
    output wire Y0
);
  wire temp1_~A1 = ~A1;
  wire temp2_~A0 = ~A0;
  assign Y0 = temp1_~A1 & temp2_~A0; // 00
assign Y1 = ~A1 & A0;  // 01
assign Y2 = A1 & ~A0;  // 10
assign Y3 = A1 & A0;   // 11
endmodule

module decoder_2to4 (
    input wire A1,
    input wire A0,
    output wire Y0,
    output wire Y1,
    output wire Y2,
    output wire Y3
);
  wire temp1_~A1 = ~A1;
  wire temp2_~A0 = ~A0;
  assign Y0 = temp1_~A1 & temp2_~A0; // Output Y0 is high when A1 A0 = 00
    assign Y1 = ~A1 &  A0; // Output Y1 is high when A1 A0 = 01
    assign Y2 =  A1 & ~A0; // Output Y2 is high when A1 A0 = 10
    assign Y3 =  A1 &  A0; // Output Y3 is high when A1 A0 = 11
endmodule

module CLA_4bit (
    input [3:0] A, // 4-bit input A
    input [3:0] B, // 4-bit input B
    input Cin,     // Carry input
    output [3:0] S, // 4-bit sum output
    output Cout    // Carry output
);
    wire [3:0] P; // Propagate
    wire [3:0] G; // Generate
    wire [3:0] C; // Carry bits

    // Generate and propagate signals
    assign P = A ^ B; // Propagate
  wire temp1_A = A;
  wire temp2_B = B;
  assign G = temp1_A & temp2_B; // Generate

    // Carry generation
    assign C[0] = G[0] | (P[0] & Cin); // Carry out from bit 0
    assign C[1] = G[1] | (P[1] & C[0]); // Carry out from bit 1
    assign C[2] = G[2] | (P[2] & C[1]); // Carry out from bit 2
    assign C[3] = G[3] | (P[3] & C[2]); // Carry out from bit 3

    // Sum generation
    assign S = P ^ {C[2:0], Cin}; // Sum output
    assign Cout = C[3]; // Final carry out

endmodule

module top_module (
        input f,
        input g,
        input h,
  wire temp1_( ~f & ~g & ~h ) |
				( ~f & ~g & h ) |
				( f & ~g & ~h ) = ( ~f & ~g & ~h ) |
				( ~f & ~g & h ) |
				( f & ~g & ~h );
  wire temp2_( f & g & h ) = ( f & g & h );
  assign m = temp1_( ~f & ~g & ~h ) |
				( ~f & ~g & h ) |
				( f & ~g & ~h ) | temp2_( f & g & h ) ;

endmodule

module top_module (
        input e,
        input f,
        input g,
  wire temp1_( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & g ) = ( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & g );
  wire temp2_( e & f & g ) = ( e & f & g );
  assign h = temp1_( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & g ) | temp2_( e & f & g );

endmodule

module top_module(
    input clk,
    input ram_full_fb_i_reg,
    input tmp_ram_rd_en,
    input [11:0] Q,
    input [63:0] din,
    output reg [63:0] dout, // Changed to reg type
    input [0:0] out
);reg [63:0] memory [4096:0]; // 4096 locations, 64 bits each
    reg [11:0] address; // register to hold the memory address
    wire write_enable = ~ram_full_fb_i_reg & ~tmp_ram_rd_en; // enable write if memory is not full and not being read from

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (tmp_ram_rd_en) begin
            dout <= memory[Q]; // This assignment is now valid
        end else if (write_enable) begin
            memory[Q] <= din;
        end
    end

  wire temp1_ram_full_fb_i_reg = ram_full_fb_i_reg;
  wire temp2_~tmp_ram_rd_en = ~tmp_ram_rd_en;
  assign out = temp1_ram_full_fb_i_reg & temp2_~tmp_ram_rd_en; // set output signal high if memory is full and a write operation is attempted

endmodule

    output out
  wire temp1_in0 | in1 | in2 | in3 | in4 | in5 | in6 = in0 | in1 | in2 | in3 | in4 | in5 | in6;
  wire temp2_in7 = in7;
  assign out = temp1_in0 | in1 | in2 | in3 | in4 | in5 | in6 | temp2_in7;

endmodule

module combinational_function (
        input i,
        input j,
        input k,
        output m);

  wire temp1_(~i & j & ~k) |
           (~i & ~j & k) |
           (i & ~j & ~k) = (~i & j & ~k) |
           (~i & ~j & k) |
           (i & ~j & ~k);
  wire temp2_(i & j & k) = (i & j & k);
  assign m = temp1_(~i & j & ~k) |
           (~i & ~j & k) |
           (i & ~j & ~k) | temp2_(i & j & k);

endmodule

				( w & ~x & y ) = ( ~w & ~x & ~y ) |
				( ~w & x & ~y ) |
				( ~w & x & y ) |
				( w & ~x & y );
  wire temp2_( w & x & y ) = ( w & x & y );
  assign z = temp1_( ~w & ~x & ~y ) |
				( ~w & x & ~y ) |

module top_module(
	input clk,
	input rst_n,
	output reg [7:0] counter,
	output C,
	input en,
	input clr
    );always @ (posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
		if(~rst_n) begin
			counter <= 0;
		end
		else begin
			if(clr) begin
				counter <= 0;
			end
			else begin
				if(en) begin
					counter <= counter + 1;
				end
			end
		end
	end

  wire temp1_(counter == 8'hff) & en = (counter == 8'hff) & en;
  wire temp2_(~clr) = (~clr);
  assign  C = temp1_(counter == 8'hff) & en & temp2_(~clr);endmodule

           ( ~a & b & c & ~d ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c & d ) |

  wire temp2_(~D1 & ~D2 & ~D3) = (~D1 & ~D2 & ~D3);

module top_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input cin,
    output [3:0] sum,
    output cout
);wire [4:0] c; // Carry wires
    wire [3:0] g; // Generate signals
    wire [3:0] p; // Propagate signals

    assign g = a ^ b; // Generate signal (XOR)
  wire temp1_a = a;
  wire temp2_b = b;
  assign p = temp1_a & temp2_b; // Propagate signal (AND)

    assign c[0] = cin; // Initial carry-in
    assign c[1] = p[0] | (g[0] & c[0]); // Carry out for bit 1
    assign c[2] = p[1] | (g[1] & c[1]); // Carry out for bit 2
    assign c[3] = p[2] | (g[2] & c[2]); // Carry out for bit 3
    assign c[4] = p[3] | (g[3] & c[3]); // Final carry out

    assign sum = g ^ {c[3:1], c[0]}; // Sum calculation using XOR with carry
    assign cout = c[4]; // Final carry out

endmodule

module top_module (
        input a,
        input b,
        input c,
  wire temp1_( ~a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( ~a & ~b & c ) |
				( a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( a & b & ~c ) = ( ~a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( ~a & ~b & c ) |
				( a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( a & b & ~c );
  wire temp2_( a & b & c ) = ( a & b & c );
  assign g = temp1_( ~a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( ~a & ~b & c ) |
				( a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( a & b & ~c ) | temp2_( a & b & c ) ;

endmodule

module logic_design (
        input i,
        input j,
        input k,
        output l);

  wire temp1_(~i & ~j & k) |
           (~i & j & k) |
           (i & ~j & k) = (~i & ~j & k) |
           (~i & j & k) |
           (i & ~j & k);
  wire temp2_(i & j & k) = (i & j & k);
  assign l = temp1_(~i & ~j & k) |
           (~i & j & k) |
           (i & ~j & k) | temp2_(i & j & k);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output X
);// Implement AND gate logic
  wire temp1_A & B = A & B;
  wire temp2_C = C;
  assign X = temp1_A & B & temp2_C;

endmodule

module top_module(
  input wire A,
  input wire B,
  input wire C,
  input wire D,
  input wire S0,
  input wire S1,
  output wire Y
  wire temp1_(S1 & S0 & D) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) | (~S1 & S0 & B) = (S1 & S0 & D) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) | (~S1 & S0 & B);
  wire temp2_(~S1 & ~S0 & A) = (~S1 & ~S0 & A);
  assign Y = temp1_(S1 & S0 & D) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | temp2_(~S1 & ~S0 & A);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input C1,
    input D1,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & C1 & D1) | (VPWR & !VGND) = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & C1 & D1) | (VPWR & !VGND);
  wire temp2_(VPB & !VNB) = (VPB & !VNB);
  assign Y = (temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & C1 & D1) | (VPWR & !VGND) | temp2_(VPB & !VNB));

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A0,
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  A3,
    input  S0,
    input  S1,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(S1 & S0 & A3) | (S1 & ~S0 & A2) | (~S1 & S0 & A1) = (S1 & S0 & A3) | (S1 & ~S0 & A2) | (~S1 & S0 & A1);
  wire temp2_(~S1 & ~S0 & A0) = (~S1 & ~S0 & A0);
  assign Y = temp1_(S1 & S0 & A3) | (S1 & ~S0 & A2) | (~S1 & S0 & A1) | temp2_(~S1 & ~S0 & A0);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input Sel,
    output Out,
    input VPB,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VNB
  wire temp1_(!Sel & A) = (!Sel & A);
  wire temp2_(Sel & B) = (Sel & B);
  assign Out = temp1_(!Sel & A) | temp2_(Sel & B);

endmodule

module top_module (
        input x1,
        input y1,
        input z1,
  wire temp1_( ~x1 & ~y1 & ~z1 ) |
				( ~x1 & ~y1 & z1 ) |
				( ~x1 & y1 & z1 ) |
				( x1 & ~y1 & z1 ) = ( ~x1 & ~y1 & ~z1 ) |
				( ~x1 & ~y1 & z1 ) |
				( ~x1 & y1 & z1 ) |
				( x1 & ~y1 & z1 );
  wire temp2_( x1 & y1 & z1 ) = ( x1 & y1 & z1 );
  assign w1 = temp1_( ~x1 & ~y1 & ~z1 ) |
				( ~x1 & ~y1 & z1 ) |
				( ~x1 & y1 & z1 ) |
				( x1 & ~y1 & z1 ) | temp2_( x1 & y1 & z1 ) ;

endmodule

module top_module (
        input e,
        input f,
        input g,
  wire temp1_( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) = ( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g );
  wire temp2_( e & f & g ) = ( e & f & g );
  assign h = temp1_( ~e & ~f & g ) |
           ( ~e & f & ~g ) |
           ( e & ~f & ~g ) | temp2_( e & f & g );

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A   ,
    input  B   ,
    input  C   ,
    output X   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
  wire temp1_A | B = A | B;
  wire temp2_C = C;
  assign X = temp1_A | B | temp2_C;
endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input S0,
    input S1,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) = (~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C);
  wire temp2_(S1 & S0 & D) = (S1 & S0 & D);
  assign Y = temp1_(~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) | temp2_(S1 & S0 & D);

endmodule

module top_module (
        input a,
        input b,
        input c,
  wire temp1_( ~a & ~b & c ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c ) = ( ~a & ~b & c ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c );
  wire temp2_( a & b & c ) = ( a & b & c );
  assign h = temp1_( ~a & ~b & c ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c ) | temp2_( a & b & c ) ;

endmodule

module top_module (
        input x,
        input y,
        input z,
  wire temp1_( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z ) = ( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z );
  wire temp2_( x & y & ~z ) = ( x & y & ~z );
  assign w = temp1_( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z ) | temp2_( x & y & ~z ) ;

endmodule

module top_module (
        input j,
        input k,
        input l,
  wire temp1_( ~j & ~k & ~l ) |
           ( ~j & k & ~l ) |
           ( j & ~k & l ) = ( ~j & ~k & ~l ) |
           ( ~j & k & ~l ) |
           ( j & ~k & l );
  wire temp2_( j & k & l ) = ( j & k & l );
  assign m = temp1_( ~j & ~k & ~l ) |
           ( ~j & k & ~l ) |
           ( j & ~k & l ) | temp2_( j & k & l );

endmodule

module logic_circuit (
        input m,
        input n,
        input o,
        output t);

  wire temp1_(~m & ~n & ~o) |
           (~m & n & o) |
           (m & ~n & ~o) = (~m & ~n & ~o) |
           (~m & n & o) |
           (m & ~n & ~o);
  wire temp2_(m & n & o) = (m & n & o);
  assign t = temp1_(~m & ~n & ~o) |
           (~m & n & o) |
           (m & ~n & ~o) | temp2_(m & n & o);

endmodule

module top_module(
    input [7:0] bus_in,
    output [7:0] bus_out,
    output reg [2:1] selected_bits_1_2,
    output reg [3:1] selected_bits_3_5
  wire temp1_bus_in = bus_in;
  wire temp2_8'b00010001 = 8'b00010001;
  assign bus_out = temp1_bus_in & temp2_8'b00010001; // Bitwise AND with constant 17

    always @(*) begin
        selected_bits_1_2 = bus_in[2:1]; // Select bits 1 and 2
        selected_bits_3_5 = bus_in[5:3]; // Select bits 3 to 5
    end

endmodule

module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  B2  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output Y   ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2);
  wire temp2_C1 = C1;
  assign Y = temp1_(A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | temp2_C1;

endmodule

module top_module(
    output X      ,
    input  A      ,
    input  SLEEP_B,
    input  VPWR   ,
    input  VGND   ,
    input  VPB    ,
    input  VNB
  wire temp1_A = A;
  wire temp2_~SLEEP_B = ~SLEEP_B;
  assign X = temp1_A & temp2_~SLEEP_B;

endmodule

module top_module (
        input q,
        input r,
        input s,
  wire temp1_( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s ) = ( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s );
  wire temp2_( q & r & s ) = ( q & r & s );
  assign t = temp1_( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s ) | temp2_( q & r & s ) ;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,

    input C,
    output X,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB
  wire temp1_A & B = A & B;
  wire temp2_C = C;
  assign X = temp1_A & B & temp2_C;

module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input A3,
    input A4,
    input B1,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2 & A3 & A4) = (A1 & A2 & A3 & A4);
  wire temp2_B1 = B1;
  assign Y = temp1_(A1 & A2 & A3 & A4) | temp2_B1;

endmodule

module top_module(
    input wire A1,
    input wire A2,
    input wire B1,
    input wire B2,
    input wire VPWR,
    input wire VGND,
    input wire VPB,
    input wire VNB,
    output wire X
  wire temp1_(A1 & A2) = (A1 & A2);
  wire temp2_(B1 & B2 & VPWR & VGND & VPB & VNB) = (B1 & B2 & VPWR & VGND & VPB & VNB);
  assign X = temp1_(A1 & A2) | temp2_(B1 & B2 & VPWR & VGND & VPB & VNB);

endmodule

module top_module (
        input m,
        input n,
        input o,
  wire temp1_( ~m & ~n & o ) |
           ( ~m & n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & o ) = ( ~m & ~n & o ) |
           ( ~m & n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & o );
  wire temp2_( m & n & o ) = ( m & n & o );
  assign s = temp1_( ~m & ~n & o ) |
           ( ~m & n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & ~o ) |
           ( m & ~n & o ) | temp2_( m & n & o ) ;

endmodule

module top_module(input wire [19:0] IN,
			  output wire OUT,
			  output wire LED
			  );wire result;
  wire temp1_IN[0] & 
							IN[1] & 
							IN[2] & 
							IN[3] & 
							IN[4] & 
							IN[5] & 
							IN[6] & 
							IN[7] & 
							IN[8] & 
							IN[9] & 
							IN[10] & 
							IN[11] & 
							IN[12] & 
							IN[13] & 
							IN[14] & 
							IN[15] & 
							IN[16] & 
							IN[17] & 
							IN[18] = IN[0] & 
							IN[1] & 
							IN[2] & 
							IN[3] & 
							IN[4] & 
							IN[5] & 
							IN[6] & 
							IN[7] & 
							IN[8] & 
							IN[9] & 
							IN[10] & 
							IN[11] & 
							IN[12] & 
							IN[13] & 
							IN[14] & 
							IN[15] & 
							IN[16] & 
							IN[17] & 
							IN[18];
  wire temp2_IN[19] = IN[19];
  assign result = 	temp1_IN[0] & 
							IN[1] & 
							IN[2] & 
							IN[3] & 
							IN[4] & 
							IN[5] & 
							IN[6] & 
							IN[7] & 
							IN[8] & 
							IN[9] & 
							IN[10] & 
							IN[11] & 
							IN[12] & 
							IN[13] & 
							IN[14] & 
							IN[15] & 
							IN[16] & 
							IN[17] & 
							IN[18] & temp2_IN[19];
							
	assign LED= result;
	assign OUT = result;


endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    input F,
    input G,
    input H,
    output Y
  wire temp1_(A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G) = (A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G);
  wire temp2_H = H;
  assign Y = temp1_(A & B & C) | (D & E & F & G) | temp2_H;

endmodule

module top_module(
	input Ploc, 
	input Pant, 
	input Gloc, 
	input Gant,
	output Psal, 
	output Gsal
  wire temp1_Ploc = Ploc;
  wire temp2_Pant = Pant;
  assign Psal = temp1_Ploc & temp2_Pant; 
	assign Gsal = Gloc|(Ploc&Gant);endmodule

module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    output SUM,
    output COUT
);// Instantiate a half-adder module or provide logic for half-adder functionality
    assign SUM = A ^ B;     // Sum is the XOR of A and B
  wire temp1_A = A;
  wire temp2_B = B;
  assign COUT = temp1_A & temp2_B;    // Carry out is the AND of A and B

endmodule

module top_module(
  input [n-1:0] data,
  input enable,
  input rs,
  output [m-1:0] ctrl
);parameter n = 8; // number of data signals
parameter m = 3; // number of control signals

  wire temp1_enable = enable;
  wire temp2_rs = rs;
  assign ctrl[0] = temp1_enable & temp2_rs; // Register Select
assign ctrl[1] = enable & ~rs; // Read/Write
assign ctrl[2] = enable & data; // Data

endmodule

module ten_to_one(
  input A1,
  input A2,
  input A3,
  input B1,
  input B2,
  input C1,
  input C2,
  input D1,
  input D2,
  input D3,
  output X
);

  wire temp1_(A1 & A2 & A3) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2) = (A1 & A2 & A3) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2);
  wire temp2_(~D1 & ~D2 & ~D3) = (~D1 & ~D2 & ~D3);
  assign X = temp1_(A1 & A2 & A3) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2) | temp2_(~D1 & ~D2 & ~D3);

endmodule
